name: Cheddar Crumble Apple Pie
recipeInstructions:
1/2 cup Unbleached Flour
1/2 teaspoon Cinnamon, Ground
1/3 cup Sugar
5 tablespoons Butter
1/3 cup Brown Sugar, Firmly Packed
1 and 1/2 pounds Cooking Apples (such as Granny Smith), Coarsely Chopped
1 tablespoon Lemon Juice, Fresh
1/4 teaspoon Nutmeg, Ground
6 ounces Cheddar Cheese, Medium Shredded
1. Make a high rim around the pie crust.
2. Combine all the dry ingredients for the topping in a bowl and cut in the butter until crumbly. Set aside.
3. Toss the apples and lemon juice together and add the cheese, flour, and nutmeg, tossing and mixing well.
4. Arrange the apples in the crust and sprinkle with the topping.
5. Bake in a preheated 375 degree F oven for 40 to 50 minutes.
6. Serve warm with Vanilla Ice Cream if desired.
